seoTitle: Werrington vs Werrington Downs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Werrington and Werrington Downs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Werrington vs Werrington Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Werrington and Werrington Downs.
heading: Werrington vs Werrington Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Werrington, New South Wales and Werrington Downs, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Werrington and Werrington Downs have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Werrington or Werrington Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Werrington has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Werrington Downs scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Werrington scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Werrington Downs scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Werrington or Werrington Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Werrington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
